title: pyrus aucuparia subvar. rossica
intro: Pyrus aucuparia subvar. rossica, also known as the Siberian mountain ash, is a subspecies of the rowan tree (Pyrus aucuparia) native to Russia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Siberian mountain ash include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include tinctures, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to create teas, topical creams, and other medicinal products.
